nodes.context: Outlaw motorcycle gang in Australia, Southeast Asia, and New Zealand. Involved in drug trafficking, violence, and organized crime.
Coalition of motorcycle clubs in New South Wales formed to address legislation and public image.
International outlaw motorcycle club, rival of Comancheros in Australia.
International outlaw motorcycle club, originally allied with a Comanchero chapter then became rivals.
Outlaw motorcycle club in conflict with Comancheros, patched over some Comanchero members.
Outlaw motorcycle club, members visited Vince Focarelli.

edges.context: Comancheros are participants in the United Motorcycle Council of NSW.
Comancheros and Hells Angels clashed at Sydney Airport in 2009 and have ongoing biker wars.
Comancheros and Bandidos engaged in the Milperra massacre in 1984 after a chapter patched over to Bandidos.
Rock Machine patched over Comanchero members causing tension and retaliatory shootings in 2012.
Finks members visited Vince Focarelli, a former Comanchero, in hospital and attended his son's funeral.
